section: 端点概览
text: 智能搜索 💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics. 智能搜索 (smartSearch.do) 即将弃用。 请勿将其用于新集成。尽可能使用 search.do。 Smart Search(Only For TMC) Advantages of Smart Search: * Supports real-time search for booking windows and routes not covered in "Search API". * Enhances search result rate and overall coverage. Points to note: * Smart Search will be activated "on demand". Please contact your account manager or sales director if you want this feature to be activated. * The ist response will return the results from the cache. if the "smartEnd"=false, send the subsequent requests until if the "smartEnd"=true to get all the results from the LIVE search. * \Use production endpoint being used for APls other than search APl.\ Workflow: * Send the "Smart Search" request(called First Request) and receive the response, which includes an ID (requestId) used to identify the entire search process, and may also contain part of the flight data(routings). * After receiving the response, if thesmartEnd=false, then send another request (called Subsequent Request) only with therequestId. * Follow this flow untilsmartEnd=true. This means that the smart search has been completed. Endpoint: https://sandbox.atriptech.com/smartSearch.do Advantages of Smart Search: * Supports real-time search for booking windows and routes not covered in "Search API". * Enhances search result rate and overall coverage. Points to note: * Smart Search will be activated "on demand". Please contact your account manager or sales director if you want this feature to be activated. * The ist response will return the results from the cache. if the "smartEnd"=false, send the subsequent requests until if the "smartEnd"=true to get all the results from the LIVE search. * Use production endpoint being used for APls other than search APl. Workflow: * Send the "Smart Search" request(called First Request) and receive the response, which includes an ID (requestId) used to identify the entire search process, and may also contain part of the flight data(routings). * After receiving the response, if thesmartEnd=false, then send another request (called Subsequent Request) only with therequestId. * Follow this flow untilsmartEnd=true. This means that the smart search has been completed. Endpoint: https://sandbox.atriptech.com/smartSearch.do

section: Smart Search(Only For TMC)（/smartSearch.do）请求体的 fromFlightNumbers 字段

fields.name: fromFlightNumbers
fields.description:
Search for specified departure flights. Each element represents one flight. Connecting flight numbers are separated by "," (comma). 
Example:
- ["FR123"]: A direct flight
- ["FR456,FR789"]: A connecting flight
- ["FR123", "FR456,FR789"]: 2 flights, a direct flight and a connecting flight

text:

Example:
- ["FR123"]: A direct flight
- ["FR456,FR789"]: A connecting flight
- ["FR123", "FR456,FR789"]: 2 flights, a direct flight and a connecting flight

section: Smart Search(Only For TMC)（/smartSearch.do）请求体的 includeMultipleFareFamily 字段

fields.name: includeMultipleFareFamily
fields.description: Search only for the lowest fare or for the Fare Families. By default, each flight only returns the lowest fare, and each array element in the response represents: flight - lowest fare. If this parameter is turned on, each element of the search results will be a combination of flight and one of the fares, that is, different elements will have the same flight but different ticket fare.

text:
Smart Search(Only For TMC)（/smartSearch.do）请求体的 includeMultipleFareFamily 字段：
- includeMultipleFareFamily (boolean，可选): Search only for the lowest fare or for the Fare Families. By default, each flight only returns the lowest fare, and each array element in the response represents: flight - lowest fare. If this parameter is turned on, each element of the search results will be a combination of flight and one of the fares, that is, different elements will have the same flight but different ticket fare.（默认值：false）

section: Routing 组件的 infantAllowed 字段

fields.name: infantAllowed
fields.description:
Since infantPrice and infantTax will never be null, when the fare does not support infants or is free for infants, both infantPrice and infantTax display 0. In this case, you need this field to distinguish which situation it is.
Scenario description:
- true: infants is supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTax will >= 0
- false: infants is not supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTaxwill be displayed as 0

- true: infants is supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTax will >= 0

section: Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段

fields.name: childMandatorySeatingFee
fields.description:
Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

text:
Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段：
- childMandatorySeatingFee (number，可选): Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeePerPax 字段

fields.name: transactionFeePerPax
fields.description: Technical service fee per passenger. This field has been deprecated and final total transaction fee will calculated based on transactionFee and transactionFeeMode.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFeePerPax 字段：
- transactionFeePerPax (number，必填) [deprecated]: Technical service fee per passenger. This field has been deprecated and final total transaction fee will calculated based on transactionFee and transactionFeeMode.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段

fields.name: transactionFee
fields.description:
Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段：
- transactionFee (number，必填): Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段

fields.name: transactionFeeMode
fields.description:
Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段：
- transactionFeeMode (ref:TransactionFeeMode，必填): Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

section: Routing 组件的 rule 字段

fields.name: rule.hasBaggage
fields.description:
This tag is used to identify if the fare includes free checked-in or cabin baggage.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

fields.name: rule.baggageElements
fields.description: The free baggage allowance

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].segmentNo
fields.description: The index of segment the baggage allowance applies to.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageType
fields.description: Type of the baggage.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].passengerType
fields.description:
The type of passenger the baggage allowance applies to.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggagePiece
fields.description:
Baggage pieces:
- 0: No limitation
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageWeight
fields.description:
Baggage Weight, with the unit of KG.
- 0: No Free baggage
- -1: No limitation on weight
- >0: Maximum weight

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageSize
fields.description:
Baggage Size:
length＊width＊height and units. eg. 56＊36＊23cm, 18＊14＊8inch.
Or Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece. eg. L+W+H<=158cm.
Empty means no limitation.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].isAllWeight
fields.description: Baggage is all weight: true or false

fields.name: rule.refundRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the refund rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundType
fields.description:
Type of refund allowed.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example, when the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to refund an inbound flight.)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundStatus
fields.description:
Refund rule types (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundFee
fields.description: Refund penalty amount (for the most restrictive condition)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of refund penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects refunds (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Free for refund

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshowFee
fields.description: Total refund fee (for the most restrictive condition): If refNoshow = H, it should not be "null". This value includes the refund fee and no-show penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundMethod
fields.description:
Refund method: CashBackToOriginalPayment or Voucher.
- CashBackToOriginalPayment: Refund cash back to the original form of payment.
- Voucher: Refund in the form of a voucher.

fields.name: rule.changesRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the change rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesType
fields.description:
Change flight type.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example. When the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to change an inbound flight)

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesStatus
fields.description:
Change flight rule type (for the most restrictive condition):
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free rescheduling

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesFee
fields.description:
Change flight fee (for the most restrictive condition):
- IfchangesStatus=H, it should not benull
- IfchangesStatus=T/F, it can benull

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].currency

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

Note:

That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

section: 端点概览
text:
查询订单

💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics.

使用此端点在 order.do 或 pay.do 后读取最新订单状态。

在此处检查 orderStatus、ticketStatus、航司 PNR 详情和票号。

Retrieve Booking

Dependency:
Order function should be called in prior to this call.

Please refer to the below information for the usage of the queryOrderDetails.do API.
  1. All the parameters can be used together, if required.
  2. “OrderNo” is “required” if “airlinePNR” and “carrier” cannot be provided upon calling the API. Inversely, “airlinePNR” and “carrier” are “required” if “OrderNo” cannot be provided. All remaining fields in the request are optional.
  3. The PNR (Passenger Name Record) for an airline ticket order or a luggage purchase order must be kept consistent, as per airline regulations.
  4. The input parameters orderNo, airlinePNR, carrier, and other optional fields will be validated together to ensure they belong to the same order data source. If any of these input parameters do not match with others, the API will return an error.
  5. Airline ticket orders and associated post-booking ancillary orders can be retrieved using the following methods: (airline ticket orders + post-booking ancillary orders):
     * orderNo
     * airlinePNR + carrier
     * orderNo + airlinePNR + carrier
     * orderNo + airlinePNR + carrier + other optional parameters
  6. In case the parameters of “airlinePNR” and “carrier” cannot identify an unique order (e.g BC - PNR is made up with 4 number), customer needs to enter additional parameters such as "name" for identification. In such scenarios, API will respond with error msg ”Multi-orderNos are identified, please request again with extra parameters added.”

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/queryOrderDetails.do

Dependency:
Order function should be called in prior to this call.

Please refer to the below information for the usage of the queryOrderDetails.do API.
  1. All the parameters can be used together, if required.
  2. “OrderNo” is “required” if “airlinePNR” and “carrier” cannot be provided upon calling the API. Inversely, “airlinePNR” and “carrier” are “required” if “OrderNo” cannot be provided. All remaining fields in the request are optional.
  3. The PNR (Passenger Name Record) for an airline ticket order or a luggage purchase order must be kept consistent, as per airline regulations.
  4. The input parameters orderNo, airlinePNR, carrier, and other optional fields will be validated together to ensure they belong to the same order data source. If any of these input parameters do not match with others, the API will return an error.
  5. Airline ticket orders and associated post-booking ancillary orders can be retrieved using the following methods: (airline ticket orders + post-booking ancillary orders):
     * orderNo
     * airlinePNR + carrier
     * orderNo + airlinePNR + carrier
     * orderNo + airlinePNR + carrier + other optional parameters
  6. In case the parameters of “airlinePNR” and “carrier” cannot identify an unique order (e.g BC - PNR is made up with 4 number), customer needs to enter additional parameters such as "name" for identification. In such scenarios, API will respond with error msg ”Multi-orderNos are identified, please request again with extra parameters added.”

fields.name: paxTicketInfos
fields.description: Ticket information for passengers, the same format as the PAXTicketInfo in order response.

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].name
fields.description: Echo the passenger's name, in the format of last name/first name

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].passengerType
fields.description:
Echo the passenger's type.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].birthday
fields.description: Echo the passenger's birthday

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].gender
fields.description: Echo the passenger's gender

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].cardNum
fields.description: Echo the passenger's  identity document number

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].cardType
fields.description: Echo the passenger's  identity document type

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].cardIssuePlace
fields.description: Echo the country where the passenger's identification document was issued.

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].cardExpired
fields.description: Echo the expiration date of the passenger's identification document.

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].nationality
fields.description: Echo the passenger's nationality

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].ticketNos
fields.description:
If the ticket has been issued, the ticket number of the passenger will be included here. The number of elements corresponds to the number of airline ticket numbers. In cases where there are multiple airline PNRs, for example, when the round-trip tickets are issued separately, they respectively correspond to the ticket numbers of the outbound journey(the first element) and the return journey(the second element).

Note: If and only if the round trip is split into two tickets, the array will contain 2 elements (corresponding to the tickets for the outbound trip and the return trip respectively); in all other cases, it will contain only one element.

fields.name: paxTicketInfos[].airlinePNRs
fields.description:
The airline PNRs will be included here if they are generated. The number of elements corresponds to the number of airline's PNR. In cases where there are multiple airline PNRs, for example, when the round-trip tickets are issued separately, they respectively correspond to the PNRs of the outbound journey(the first element) and the return journey(the second element).

Note: If and only if the round trip is split into two PNRs(or tickets), the array will contain 2 elements (corresponding to the PNRs for the outbound trip and the return trip respectively); in all other cases, it will contain only one element.

section: Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段

fields.name: childMandatorySeatingFee
fields.description:
Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

text:
Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段：
- childMandatorySeatingFee (number，可选): Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段

fields.name: transactionFee
fields.description:
Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段：
- transactionFee (number，必填): Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段

fields.name: transactionFeeMode
fields.description:
Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

text:

- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

section: Routing 组件的 rule 字段

fields.name: rule.hasBaggage
fields.description:
This tag is used to identify if the fare includes free checked-in or cabin baggage.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

fields.name: rule.baggageElements
fields.description: The free baggage allowance

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].segmentNo
fields.description: The index of segment the baggage allowance applies to.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageType
fields.description: Type of the baggage.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].passengerType
fields.description:
The type of passenger the baggage allowance applies to.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggagePiece
fields.description:
Baggage pieces:
- 0: No limitation
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageWeight
fields.description:
Baggage Weight, with the unit of KG.
- 0: No Free baggage
- -1: No limitation on weight
- >0: Maximum weight

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageSize
fields.description:
Baggage Size:
length＊width＊height and units. eg. 56＊36＊23cm, 18＊14＊8inch.
Or Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece. eg. L+W+H<=158cm.
Empty means no limitation.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].isAllWeight
fields.description: Baggage is all weight: true or false

fields.name: rule.refundRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the refund rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundType
fields.description:
Type of refund allowed.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example, when the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to refund an inbound flight.)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundStatus
fields.description:
Refund rule types (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundFee
fields.description: Refund penalty amount (for the most restrictive condition)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of refund penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects refunds (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Free for refund

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshowFee
fields.description: Total refund fee (for the most restrictive condition): If refNoshow = H, it should not be "null". This value includes the refund fee and no-show penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundMethod
fields.description:
Refund method: CashBackToOriginalPayment or Voucher.
- CashBackToOriginalPayment: Refund cash back to the original form of payment.
- Voucher: Refund in the form of a voucher.

fields.name: rule.changesRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the change rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesType
fields.description:
Change flight type.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example. When the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to change an inbound flight)

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesStatus
fields.description:
Change flight rule type (for the most restrictive condition):
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free rescheduling

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesFee
fields.description:
Change flight fee (for the most restrictive condition):
- IfchangesStatus=H, it should not benull
- IfchangesStatus=T/F, it can benull

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of change flight fee

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects changes (for the most restrictive condition).
Valid values:
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free flight change

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshowFee
fields.description: The total fee charged to change flight in case of no show. If revNoshow = H, it should not be "null." This value includes the change flight fee and no-show penalty.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList
fields.description: Change conditions

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].status
fields.description:
Level of refund/change.
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].startMinute
fields.description: Starting time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].endMinute
fields.description: Ending time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].amount
fields.description: Penalty amount for refund/change. If thestatusindicates free refund/change, then this field will be either0ornull.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].currency
fields.description: The currency of penalty

fields.name: rule.serviceElements
fields.description: This function is used to fetch the other service rules of the fare. There is only one array for one way, and two arrays for round-trip. The first array is for the outbound, and the second array is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeSeat
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free seat selection is included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included
- 2: Partially free

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeMeal
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free meals are included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

- false: The weight is for each piece

fields.description:
The maximum number of pieces that can be purchased per person.

- >0: Maximum pieces

The maximum weight that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No limitation for weight
- >0: Weight limit (KG)

section: 端点概览
text:
确认订单

💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics.

在指南和链接中使用 确认订单 作为主要名称。

此 API 映射到 orderCommit.do。

旧版资料可能称之为 Order Commit（订单提交）。

Order Commit

This API is only required in the FR integration process. After create an order and before payment, you need to call this API to obtain the link of the FR order confirmation page and display it to users. Users should confirm the order through this page, and finally customer pay to Atlas.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/orderCommit.do

This API is only required in the FR integration process. After create an order and before payment, you need to call this API to obtain the link of the FR order confirmation page and display it to users. Users should confirm the order through this page, and finally customer pay to Atlas.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/orderCommit.do

section: 端点概览
text:
获取报价

💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics.

当目标行程已知时使用此端点。

它返回 order.do 和可选的辅助服务查询使用的 OfferId。

使用 OpenAPI 命名作为权威来源。

在实现和文档中使用 getOffers.do。

getOffers.do 与 verify.do 共享一个 60 QPM 的履约池。

超出限制的请求返回 HTTP 429 Too Many Requests。

请等待返回的 retryAfter 值后再重试。

有关共享规则和计数详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Get Offer

Dependency:
No preceding function needs to be called before Get Offer.

- Compared to the Verify API, the GetOffer API does not rely on Search results and improves the success rate of price verify. 
- Please contact your Key Account Manager if you want to use the GetOffer API. Atlas will review your workflow and if deemed aplicable, Atlas will provide further information and support you with the implementation of this API.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/getOffers.do

section: 响应字段 data

fields.name: data[].offer.offerID
fields.description: The unique ID for this offer, globally unique.

fields.name: data[].offer.paxFares
fields.description: Contains ticket prices and taxes corresponding to each passenger type. If there are no elements for certain passenger types in the list, it means that the ticket is not currently being sold for that passenger type.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].journeyRefIDs
fields.description: The reference to the journey ID indicates the journey to which the rule applies, which may include references to multiple journey IDs (such as round trips), indicating that multiple journeys are applicable to the rule.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].amount
fields.description: Pennalty amount. Unit: Yuan. Keep up to 2 decimal places.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].currency
fields.description: Currency code corresponding to the pennalty amount, in capital letters. This currency may be different from the fare currency, depending on the airline.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule
fields.description: Calculation rules for the penalty

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.type
fields.description: Rule type: Refund or Change rule

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.paxTypes
fields.description: There may be multiple types of passengers to which this rule applies

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.levelType
fields.description:
- Full: If it is a refund, it means a full refund; If it is a rescheduling, it means free rescheduling
- Partial: If it is a refund, it means a partial refund; If it is a rescheduling, it means that there will be a fee for reschedulin
- None: If it is a refund, it means it cannot be refunded; If it is a rescheduling, it means that rescheduling is not possible

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.effectiveMinutes
fields.description: Form a time interval together with expiratorMinutes to indicate the time range within which the rule applies. This value serves as the starting point of the interval, measured in minutes. >= 0 represents the number of minutes before takeoff, <0 represents the number of minutes after takeoff.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.expirationMinutes
fields.description: Form a time interval together with expirationMinutes to indicate the time range within which the rule applies. This value serves as the end point of the interval, measured in minutes. >=0 represents the number of minutes before takeoff, <0 represents the number of minutes after takeoff.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.fixedAmount
fields.description: Fixed deduction penalty. Unit: Yuan, with a maximum of 2 decimal places retained.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.airlineFee
fields.description: Fixed deduction of airline handling fees. Unit: Yuan, with a maximum of 2 decimal places retained.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.currency
fields.description: Currency of penalty and airline handling fees. This currency may be different from the fare currency, depending on the airline.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.percent
fields.description: Penalty percentage

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.percentBase
fields.description:
Penalty percentage base.
- fare+tax: The base for calculating the percentage is the total price including tax
- fare: It indicates that the penalty percentage is based on the base price, excluding tax

fields.name: data[].offer.services
fields.description: Includes various free and chargeable services, including but not limited to: baggages, seat selection, meals, etc

fields.name: data[].offer.inboundJourney
fields.description: Inbound journey, null means one-way.

fields.name: data[].supportedPaymentMethods
fields.description: Supported payment methods. nullor[]indicates that no payment methods are available.

section: UniqueSellingSegment 组件的 flightNumber 字段

fields.name: flightNumber
fields.description: Marketing flight number. Attention: Without airline code prefix. It should be noted that some users may enter flight numbers with or without zero padding, for example, you may enter 06 (or 6), but the airline may be 6 (or 06). Anyway, we will return to the user based on the actual flight number provided by the airline, and the user may need to handle the differences between request and response.

text:
UniqueSellingSegment 组件的 flightNumber 字段：
- flightNumber (string，必填): Marketing flight number. Attention: Without airline code prefix. It should be noted that some users may enter flight numbers with or without zero padding, for example, you may enter 06 (or 6), but the airline may be 6 (or 06). Anyway, we will return to the user based on the actual flight number provided by the airline, and the user may need to handle the differences between request and response.

section: UniqueSellingSegment 组件的 departureDate 字段

fields.name: departureDate
fields.description: Departure date. Format: yyyyMMdd. We do not require users to specify departure times, nor do we want to return segments based on specific departure time. Considering that the externally transmitted time may not match the actual flight segment time on the supplier's (airline's) side, this can lead to search results being lost. Therefore, we will return the results of all flight segments that took off within the specified date, and it will be up to the user to decide how to use them.

text:
UniqueSellingSegment 组件的 departureDate 字段：
- departureDate (string，必填): Departure date. Format: yyyyMMdd. We do not require users to specify departure times, nor do we want to return segments based on specific departure time. Considering that the externally transmitted time may not match the actual flight segment time on the supplier's (airline's) side, this can lead to search results being lost. Therefore, we will return the results of all flight segments that took off within the specified date, and it will be up to the user to decide how to use them.

section: 端点概览
text:
行李

💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics.

使用此端点进行流入行李查询。

getLuggage.do 与 seatAvailability.do 共享一个 60 QPM 的辅助服务池。

超出限制的请求返回 HTTP 429 Too Many Requests。

请等待返回的 retryAfter 值后再重试。

GetLuggage 调用规则

在有效的预订链中使用 getLuggage.do。

支持的请求上下文：

* verify.do 返回的 sessionId，作为 offerId 发送
* getOffers.do 返回的 OfferId

如何处理响应

getLuggage.do 返回当前行程的行李产品。

每个产品都有一个 productCode。

在选择行李时，将该 productCode 用于 order.do。

注意事项

* 在目标行程确认后查询行李
* 保持当前预订上下文的行李映射一致
* 对于联程航班，保持同一方向连接航段的行李选择一致

有关共享规则和计数详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Get Luggage

In a booking process, please call the 'getLuggage' API to get precise baggage quotes after price verification via 'verify' or 'getOffer'.
Steps:
1. API sequence
   * Search - Verify- getLuggage - Order - Pay
   * getOffer - getLuggage - Order - Pay
2. For exact baggage prices, request 'getLuggage'.
3. Pass 'offerId' in 'getLuggage' requests:
   * From 'verify': Use sessionId as offerId
   * From 'getOffer': Use its offerId directly.
4. 'getLuggage' returns all flight segments' baggage data, each identified by a unique productCode.
5. In the Order step, use the productCode to add specific baggage products to the ticket order.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/getLuggage.do

In a booking process, please call the 'getLuggage' API to get precise baggage quotes after price verification via 'verify' or 'getOffer'.
Steps:
1. API sequence
   * Search - Verify- getLuggage - Order - Pay
   * getOffer - getLuggage - Order - Pay
2. For exact baggage prices, request 'getLuggage'.
3. Pass 'offerId' in 'getLuggage' requests:
   * From 'verify': Use sessionId as offerId
   * From 'getOffer': Use its offerId directly.
4. 'getLuggage' returns all flight segments' baggage data, each identified by a unique productCode.
5. In the Order step, use the productCode to add specific baggage products to the ticket order.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/getLuggage.do

fields.name: maxResponseTime
fields.description:
Query timeout, unit: milliseconds, default 5000ms.
Note: Due to network transmission and computational performance impacts, the client may still receive a normal result (rather than a timeout) even if this duration is exceeded. This time is used to control the overall response time of the interface within a certain range, with an error generally not exceeding a few hundred milliseconds.
If you have strict requirements for the timeout, it is recommended to set the timeout of your HTTP toolkit. If the HTTP toolkit you are using does not support this capability, you may need to leverage other tools—related capabilities are generally provided in most programming languages.

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

section: 端点概览
text:
Get Offer Price

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

使用 核价出票 作为 getOfferPrice.do 的文档名称。

此端点启动履约流程。

当你需要履约特定的定价，并可以在 order.do 后立即进行支付时使用它。

将返回的上下文视为履约专用。

有关请求限制详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Get Offer Price

Dependency:
No preceding function needs to be called before Get Offer.

Compared with the traditional Search API, the Fulfillment API provides the following core capabilities:
-24/7 automated real-time fulfillment with zero manual intervention;
-Automatic alerts triggered when the full-link timeout exceeds 5 minutes;
-Unlimited ticketing for flights with imminent departure.
Applicable Scenarios:
It is designed for workflows where your order information has been fully confirmed, and Atlas needs to complete instant price verification and ticketing.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/getOfferPrice.do

section: 响应字段 data

fields.name: data[].offer.offerID
fields.description: The unique ID for this offer, globally unique.

fields.name: data[].offer.paxFares
fields.description: Contains ticket prices and taxes corresponding to each passenger type. If there are no elements for certain passenger types in the list, it means that the ticket is not currently being sold for that passenger type.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].journeyRefIDs
fields.description: The reference to the journey ID indicates the journey to which the rule applies, which may include references to multiple journey IDs (such as round trips), indicating that multiple journeys are applicable to the rule.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].amount
fields.description: Pennalty amount. Unit: Yuan. Keep up to 2 decimal places.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].currency
fields.description: Currency code corresponding to the pennalty amount, in capital letters. This currency may be different from the fare currency, depending on the airline.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule
fields.description: Calculation rules for the penalty

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.type
fields.description: Rule type: Refund or Change rule

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.paxTypes
fields.description: There may be multiple types of passengers to which this rule applies

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.levelType
fields.description:
- Full: If it is a refund, it means a full refund; If it is a rescheduling, it means free rescheduling
- Partial: If it is a refund, it means a partial refund; If it is a rescheduling, it means that there will be a fee for reschedulin
- None: If it is a refund, it means it cannot be refunded; If it is a rescheduling, it means that rescheduling is not possible

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.effectiveMinutes
fields.description: Form a time interval together with expiratorMinutes to indicate the time range within which the rule applies. This value serves as the starting point of the interval, measured in minutes. >= 0 represents the number of minutes before takeoff, <0 represents the number of minutes after takeoff.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.expirationMinutes
fields.description: Form a time interval together with expirationMinutes to indicate the time range within which the rule applies. This value serves as the end point of the interval, measured in minutes. >=0 represents the number of minutes before takeoff, <0 represents the number of minutes after takeoff.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.fixedAmount
fields.description: Fixed deduction penalty. Unit: Yuan, with a maximum of 2 decimal places retained.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.airlineFee
fields.description: Fixed deduction of airline handling fees. Unit: Yuan, with a maximum of 2 decimal places retained.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.currency
fields.description: Currency of penalty and airline handling fees. This currency may be different from the fare currency, depending on the airline.

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.percent
fields.description: Penalty percentage

fields.name: data[].offer.penalties[].rule.percentBase
fields.description:
Penalty percentage base.
- fare+tax: The base for calculating the percentage is the total price including tax
- fare: It indicates that the penalty percentage is based on the base price, excluding tax

fields.name: data[].offer.services
fields.description: Includes various free and chargeable services, including but not limited to: baggages, seat selection, meals, etc

fields.name: data[].offer.inboundJourney
fields.description: Inbound journey, null means one-way.

fields.name: data[].supportedPaymentMethods
fields.description: Supported payment methods. nullor[]indicates that no payment methods are available.

text:
响应字段 data：
- data (array<object>，可选)（还有 26 个嵌套子字段，完整字段名/类型/含义见该 chunk 的 fields 元数据，不在此列出）

section: UniqueSellingSegment 组件的 departureDate 字段

fields.name: departureDate
fields.description: Departure date. Format: yyyyMMdd. We do not require users to specify departure times, nor do we want to return segments based on specific departure time. Considering that the externally transmitted time may not match the actual flight segment time on the supplier's (airline's) side, this can lead to search results being lost. Therefore, we will return the results of all flight segments that took off within the specified date, and it will be up to the user to decide how to use them.

section: 端点概览
text:
创建订单

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

使用此端点在验证后创建预订。

它使用当前的 sessionId，并返回 pay.do 和订单后续操作使用的 orderNo。

联程航班的行李

Atlas 可能按航段返回行李选项。

对于同一方向的联程航班，请在所有连接的航段上保持行李选择一致。

如果去程连接航段使用不同的行李选择，或回程连接航段使用不同的行李选择，订单创建可能失败并返回 307。

去程和回程仍可使用不同的行李选择。

使用验证作为 bookingRequirement 和当前 sessionId 的权威来源。

Order

Dependency:
Verify function should be called in prior to this call.

The booking requirements need to be read from the "bookingRequirement" array in the "verify.do" response. The "Booking Requirements" can be different at the route level. Alternatively, you can add all the details but please note that all the fields should have actual data and not fictitious information. Please follow this approach.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/order.do

Dependency:
Verify function should be called in prior to this call.

The booking requirements need to be read from the "bookingRequirement" array in the "verify.do" response. The "Booking Requirements" can be different at the route level. Alternatively, you can add all the details but please note that all the fields should have actual data and not fictitious information. Please follow this approach.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/order.do

section: Order（/order.do）请求体的 passengers 字段

fields.name: passengers
fields.description: Passengers' information

fields.name: passengers[].name
fields.description: The passenger's name. Please send it in the following format: Family Name/Given Name

fields.name: passengers[].passengerType
fields.description:
Type of passenger.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: passengers[].gender
fields.description:
The passenger's gender.
- M: Male
- F: Female

fields.name: passengers[].birthday
fields.description: The passenger's date of birth. Format:YYYYMMDD. Please fill in according to the passenger information requirements(bookingRequirement) returned by the Verification / Get Offer API.

fields.name: passengers[].cardType
fields.description:
The type of the identity document.
- PP: Passport
- GA: Hong Kong Macau Pass for China mainland citizens
- TW: Taiwan Pass for China mainland citizens
- TB: China mainland pass for Taiwanese
- HY: International Seaman's Certificate

fields.name: passengers[].cardNum
fields.description: The unique identifier of the identity document. e.g. the passport number. Please fill in according to the passenger information requirements(bookingRequirement) returned by the Verification / Get Offer API.

fields.name: passengers[].cardIssuePlace
fields.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country where the identity document is issued. Please fill in according to the passenger information requirements(bookingRequirement) returned by the Verification / Get Offer API.

fields.name: passengers[].cardExpired
fields.description: The date on which the identity document expires. Format:YYYYMMDD.Please fill in according to the passenger information requirements(bookingRequirement) returned by the Verification / Get Offer API.

fields.name: passengers[].nationality
fields.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the nationality of passenger. Please fill in according to the passenger information requirements(bookingRequirement) returned by the Verification / Get Offer API.

fields.name: passengers[].ffpCardNo
fields.description: The passenger's account number for this frequent flyer account

fields.name: passengers[].ffpCarrier
fields.description: The IATA code for the airline that this frequent flyer account belongs to

fields.name: passengers[].ancillaries
fields.description: Ancillaries selection for the specific passenger

fields.name: passengers[].ancillaries[].productCode
fields.description: Ancillary product code(productCode). Got from routing element in the search/revalidation response.

fields.name: passengers[].ancillaries[].segmentIndex
fields.description: Segment sequence

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo
fields.description: Resident Info

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo.docType
fields.description: Certificate types supported by resident' prices

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo.docNum
fields.description: ID number, if the ID type is D, E

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo.municipality
fields.description: Municipal district code

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo.largeFamilyCert
fields.description: Large Family Cert

fields.name: passengers[].residentInfo.community
fields.description: Community Region Code

fields.name: duplicateOrders

section: Routing 组件的 infantAllowed 字段

fields.name: infantAllowed
fields.description:
Since infantPrice and infantTax will never be null, when the fare does not support infants or is free for infants, both infantPrice and infantTax display 0. In this case, you need this field to distinguish which situation it is.
Scenario description:
- true: infants is supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTax will >= 0
- false: infants is not supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTaxwill be displayed as 0

section: Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段

fields.name: childMandatorySeatingFee
fields.description:
Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

text:
Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段：
- childMandatorySeatingFee (number，可选): Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段

fields.name: transactionFee
fields.description:
Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段：
- transactionFee (number，必填): Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段

fields.name: transactionFeeMode
fields.description:
Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

text:

section: Routing 组件的 rule 字段

fields.name: rule.hasBaggage
fields.description:
This tag is used to identify if the fare includes free checked-in or cabin baggage.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

fields.name: rule.baggageElements
fields.description: The free baggage allowance

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].segmentNo
fields.description: The index of segment the baggage allowance applies to.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageType
fields.description: Type of the baggage.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].passengerType
fields.description:
The type of passenger the baggage allowance applies to.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggagePiece
fields.description:
Baggage pieces:
- 0: No limitation
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageWeight
fields.description:
Baggage Weight, with the unit of KG.
- 0: No Free baggage
- -1: No limitation on weight
- >0: Maximum weight

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageSize
fields.description:
Baggage Size:
length＊width＊height and units. eg. 56＊36＊23cm, 18＊14＊8inch.
Or Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece. eg. L+W+H<=158cm.
Empty means no limitation.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].isAllWeight
fields.description: Baggage is all weight: true or false

fields.name: rule.refundRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the refund rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundType
fields.description:
Type of refund allowed.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example, when the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to refund an inbound flight.)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundStatus
fields.description:
Refund rule types (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundFee
fields.description: Refund penalty amount (for the most restrictive condition)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of refund penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects refunds (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Free for refund

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshowFee
fields.description: Total refund fee (for the most restrictive condition): If refNoshow = H, it should not be "null". This value includes the refund fee and no-show penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundMethod
fields.description:
Refund method: CashBackToOriginalPayment or Voucher.
- CashBackToOriginalPayment: Refund cash back to the original form of payment.
- Voucher: Refund in the form of a voucher.

fields.name: rule.changesRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the change rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesType
fields.description:
Change flight type.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example. When the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to change an inbound flight)

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesStatus
fields.description:
Change flight rule type (for the most restrictive condition):
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free rescheduling

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesFee
fields.description:
Change flight fee (for the most restrictive condition):
- IfchangesStatus=H, it should not benull
- IfchangesStatus=T/F, it can benull

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of change flight fee

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects changes (for the most restrictive condition).
Valid values:
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free flight change

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshowFee
fields.description: The total fee charged to change flight in case of no show. If revNoshow = H, it should not be "null." This value includes the change flight fee and no-show penalty.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList
fields.description: Change conditions

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].status
fields.description:
Level of refund/change.
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].startMinute
fields.description: Starting time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].endMinute
fields.description: Ending time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].amount
fields.description: Penalty amount for refund/change. If thestatusindicates free refund/change, then this field will be either0ornull.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].currency
fields.description: The currency of penalty

fields.name: rule.serviceElements
fields.description: This function is used to fetch the other service rules of the fare. There is only one array for one way, and two arrays for round-trip. The first array is for the outbound, and the second array is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeSeat
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free seat selection is included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included
- 2: Partially free

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeMeal
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free meals are included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

text:
AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段：
- ancillaryCode (string，必填): A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.size
fields.description: Maximum size for the baggage

The maximum weight that can be purchased per person.

- >0: Weight limit (KG)

section: 端点概览
text:
座位

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

使用此端点进行流入座位查询。

seatAvailability.do 不再支持独立模式。

仅使用 verify.do 的有效 sessionId 或 getOffers.do 的 OfferId 进行调用。

不要仅使用航班数据调用它。

seatAvailability.do 与 getLuggage.do 共享一个 60 QPM 的辅助服务池。

超出限制的请求返回 HTTP 429 Too Many Requests。

请等待返回的 retryAfter 值后再重试。

SeatAvailability 调用规则

仅在有效的预订链中使用 seatAvailability.do。

支持的请求上下文：

* verify.do 返回的 sessionId
* getOffers.do 返回的 OfferId

不支持的请求上下文：

* 仅航班信息

区域处理

全球客户

保持当前流程。

像以前一样使用 sessionId 或 OfferId。

中国 OTA 场景

某些上游座位请求仅包含航班信息。

对于这种情况，保留 verify.do 返回的 sessionId。

当座位请求到达时，将航班与缓存的 sessionId 进行匹配。

如果匹配成功，使用该 sessionId 调用 seatAvailability.do。

如果不存在匹配，则将其视为纯询价请求。

Atlas 不支持这种情况。

变更原因

此规则确保座位定价和履约与实际预订链保持一致。

同时也减少了无效的航司侧查询。

有关共享规则和计数详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Seat Availability

Dependency:
Verify or getOffer function should be called in prior to this call.

In a booking process, please call the 'seatAvailability' API to get seat availability information after price verification via 'verify' or 'getOffer'.
Steps:
1. API sequence
   * Search - Verify- seatAvailability - Order - Pay
   * getOffer - seatAvailability - Order - Pay
2. Pass 'offerId' in 'seatAvailability' requests:
   * From 'verify': Use sessionId directly.
   From 'getOffer': Use its offerId.
3. In the Order step, use the productCode to add specific seat to the ticket order.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/seatAvailability.do

Dependency:
Verify or getOffer function should be called in prior to this call.

In a booking process, please call the 'seatAvailability' API to get seat availability information after price verification via 'verify' or 'getOffer'.
Steps:
1. API sequence
   * Search - Verify- seatAvailability - Order - Pay
   * getOffer - seatAvailability - Order - Pay
2. Pass 'offerId' in 'seatAvailability' requests:
   * From 'verify': Use sessionId directly.
   From 'getOffer': Use its offerId.
3. In the Order step, use the productCode to add specific seat to the ticket order.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/seatAvailability.do

section: 响应字段 cabins

fields.name: cabins
fields.description: An array containing all cabins and the seat layouts within them.

fields.name: cabins[].segmentIndex
fields.description: The segment index to which the cabin belongs

fields.name: cabins[].cabin
fields.description: An object used to describe the seat layout within a cabin.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.deck
fields.description: Main deck or upper deck above that, which is found on some large aircraft.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinClass
fields.description: Service grade of the fare

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout
fields.description: Used to describe the seat layout of the cabin.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.columns
fields.description: Contains columns and seat information for seat display purposes. Returns the characteristics for each column. Provided in the order from left to right.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.columns[].designator
fields.description:
A letter used to uniquely identify the seat position in the column.
Typical values: A,B,C,D,E,F

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.columns[].characteristics
fields.description:
characteristics of column:
-A: column by the aisle
-M: middle column
-W: column by the window

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.rows
fields.description: Contains rows and seat information for seat display purposes Returns the starting end row position for each column

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.rows.first
fields.description: First-row number Row starting row position for columns A,B,C,D,E,F

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.rows.last
fields.description: Last row number Row ending row position for columns A,B,C,D,E,F

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.exitRowPositions
fields.description: Return the position of exit rows, if applicable. The row number generally starts from 1 and increases from the front to the tail of the aircraft, that is, the seats close to the cockpit (nose) have the smallest row numbers, and the closer to the tail, the larger the row numbers.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.exitRowPositions[].first
fields.description: Exit seat starting row position

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.cabinLayout.exitRowPositions[].last
fields.description: Exit seat ending row position

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows
fields.description: A list of rows in this cabin. A cabin row has one or more seats.

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].number
fields.description: Seat row number

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats
fields.description: A list of seats that make up this row

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats[].column
fields.description: The column where the seat is located

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats[].seatStatus
fields.description:
A flag used to indicate whether a seat is free or occupied.
- F: Free
- O: Occupied

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats[].seatCharacteristics
fields.description:
A list contains seat characteristics, typical values(but not limited to):
-A: Aisle seat
-E: Exit and emergency exit
-I: Seat suitable for adult with an infant
-IE: Seat not suitable for child
-L: Leg space seat
-U: Seat suitable for unaccompanied minors
-V: Seat to be left vacant or offered last
-W: Window seat

For more information, please refer to: EDIFACT Standards for Seat Characteristics (9825).

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats[].price

fields.name: cabins[].cabin.rows[].seats[].currency
fields.description: Currency of the price.

section: 端点概览
text:
搜索

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

本网站中的 API 参考端点示例均使用 沙箱 基础 URL。

生产流量请使用 ATRIP 中 My Profile → Company Information 显示的生产 API 基础 URL。

生产环境使用 两个 API 基础 URL：

* 一个用于 search 流量
* 一个用于其他所有交易类 API

不要将生产流量发送到沙箱端点。

当 Atlas 是您的主要搜索入口点时使用此端点。

它返回 verify.do 使用的 routingIdentifier。

智能搜索 (smartSearch.do) 即将弃用。

新集成请使用 search.do。

search.do 默认使用 10 QPS。

超出限制的请求返回 HTTP 429 Too Many Requests。

请等待返回的 retryAfter 值后再重试。

有关共享规则和计数详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Search

Dependency:
No preceding function needs to be called before Search.

The search results will include a lot of items. Some highlights are: 
- The returned currency is by configuration according to the business agreement between you and Atlas
- The total cost to purchase for a single adult passenger is: adultPrice+adultTax+transactionFeePerPax
- For the airlines which support pass through payment method, we would set supportCreditTransPayment to 1 and present the vendor's fare in the vendorFare element. Alternatively, if the airline doesn't support pass through payment method, we would set supportCreditTransPayment to 0 and the vendorFare element will be null.
- You can choose to show or hide ancillaryProductElements in search response, according to the configuration of each client in the backend system.
- The links element will have the link to the terms and conditions of the airlines.
- Display Currency is only to be used for display purposes. The amount in the response is not to be used for fare comparison or accounting purposes. The display currency conversion will be available in fares, taxes and ancillary baggage sections of the search and verify response. When the "vendorFare" element is available, the conversion will be from the vendor fare. In the absence of the "vendorFare" element, the conversion would be from the transacted fare.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/search.do

Dependency:
No preceding function needs to be called before Search.

The search results will include a lot of items. Some highlights are: 
- The returned currency is by configuration according to the business agreement between you and Atlas
- The total cost to purchase for a single adult passenger is: adultPrice+adultTax+transactionFeePerPax
- For the airlines which support pass through payment method, we would set supportCreditTransPayment to 1 and present the vendor's fare in the vendorFare element. Alternatively, if the airline doesn't support pass through payment method, we would set supportCreditTransPayment to 0 and the vendorFare element will be null.
- You can choose to show or hide ancillaryProductElements in search response, according to the configuration of each client in the backend system.
- The links element will have the link to the terms and conditions of the airlines.
- Display Currency is only to be used for display purposes. The amount in the response is not to be used for fare comparison or accounting purposes. The display currency conversion will be available in fares, taxes and ancillary baggage sections of the search and verify response. When the "vendorFare" element is available, the conversion will be from the vendor fare. In the absence of the "vendorFare" element, the conversion would be from the transacted fare.

section: Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段

fields.name: childMandatorySeatingFee
fields.description:
Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

text:
Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段：
- childMandatorySeatingFee (number，可选): Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段

fields.name: transactionFee
fields.description:
Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段：
- transactionFee (number，必填): Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段

fields.name: transactionFeeMode
fields.description:
Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段：
- transactionFeeMode (ref:TransactionFeeMode，必填): Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order
