section: Routing 组件的 rule 字段

fields.name: rule.hasBaggage
fields.description:
This tag is used to identify if the fare includes free checked-in or cabin baggage.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

fields.name: rule.baggageElements
fields.description: The free baggage allowance

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].segmentNo
fields.description: The index of segment the baggage allowance applies to.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageType
fields.description: Type of the baggage.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].passengerType
fields.description:
The type of passenger the baggage allowance applies to.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggagePiece
fields.description:
Baggage pieces:
- 0: No limitation
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageWeight
fields.description:
Baggage Weight, with the unit of KG.
- 0: No Free baggage
- -1: No limitation on weight
- >0: Maximum weight

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageSize
fields.description:
Baggage Size:
length＊width＊height and units. eg. 56＊36＊23cm, 18＊14＊8inch.
Or Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece. eg. L+W+H<=158cm.
Empty means no limitation.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].isAllWeight
fields.description: Baggage is all weight: true or false

fields.name: rule.refundRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the refund rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundType
fields.description:
Type of refund allowed.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example, when the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to refund an inbound flight.)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundStatus
fields.description:
Refund rule types (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundFee
fields.description: Refund penalty amount (for the most restrictive condition)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of refund penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects refunds (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Free for refund

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshowFee
fields.description: Total refund fee (for the most restrictive condition): If refNoshow = H, it should not be "null". This value includes the refund fee and no-show penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundMethod
fields.description:
Refund method: CashBackToOriginalPayment or Voucher.
- CashBackToOriginalPayment: Refund cash back to the original form of payment.
- Voucher: Refund in the form of a voucher.

fields.name: rule.changesRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the change rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesType
fields.description:
Change flight type.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example. When the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to change an inbound flight)

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesStatus
fields.description:
Change flight rule type (for the most restrictive condition):
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free rescheduling

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesFee
fields.description:
Change flight fee (for the most restrictive condition):
- IfchangesStatus=H, it should not benull
- IfchangesStatus=T/F, it can benull

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of change flight fee

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects changes (for the most restrictive condition).
Valid values:
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshowFee
fields.description: The total fee charged to change flight in case of no show. If revNoshow = H, it should not be "null." This value includes the change flight fee and no-show penalty.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList
fields.description: Change conditions

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].status
fields.description:
Level of refund/change.
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].startMinute
fields.description: Starting time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].endMinute
fields.description: Ending time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].amount
fields.description: Penalty amount for refund/change. If thestatusindicates free refund/change, then this field will be either0ornull.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].currency
fields.description: The currency of penalty

fields.name: rule.serviceElements
fields.description: This function is used to fetch the other service rules of the fare. There is only one array for one way, and two arrays for round-trip. The first array is for the outbound, and the second array is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeSeat
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free seat selection is included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included
- 2: Partially free

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeMeal
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free meals are included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

text:
AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段：
- ancillaryCode (string，必填): A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

Mark whether theweightfield restricts the total weight or the weight of a single piece.
- true: The weight is for all the pieces
- false: The weight is for each piece

fields.description:
The maximum number of pieces that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No Limitation about piece
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.size
fields.description: Maximum size for the baggage

fields.description:
The maximum weight that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No limitation for weight
- >0: Weight limit (KG)

section: 端点概览
text:
比价搜索

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

使用此 API 进行售前航线覆盖和原始价格发现。

这不是标准的预订步骤。

priceCompareSearch.do 仅对售前客户可用。

默认使用配额为每天 1,000 次调用。

不要将返回的价格视为生产预订价格。

此 API 的功能

* 以最大航线覆盖范围返回原始价格
* 跳过预订规则过滤
* 忽略供应商运营开关
* 先检查 Atlas 缓存，然后回退到航司实时定价

请求兼容性

请求体与 search.do 完全兼容。

无需额外请求字段。

使用相同的核心字段：

* tripType、adultNum、childNum、infantNum
* fromCity、toCity、fromDate、retDate
* airlines、currency、includeMultipleFareFamily

如何读取响应

当存在结果时

API 返回 status: 0、msg: "success" 和非空的 routings 数组。

routings 结构匹配 search.do。

当不存在结果时

没有结果仍然返回 status: 0。

这是正常的业务结果。

检查以下两者：

* routings.length
* noResultReason.code

不要仅依赖 status。

noResultReason

当 routings 为空时，响应可能包含 noResultReason。

它包含：

* code — 机器可读的原因
* message — 人类可读的详情
* recentFlightDates — 可选的实际航班计划附近日期

原因代码

ROUTE_NOT_SUPPORTED

该航线不在 Atlas 覆盖范围内。

不要重试同一航线。

AIRLINE_NO_FLIGHT

航司未返回该航线和日期的航班信息。

检查 recentFlightDates 并使用其他支持的日期重试。

FLIGHT_SOLD_OUT

航班存在，但无可用座位。

检查 recentFlightDates 并使用其他日期重试。

PRICE_FETCH_FAILED

Atlas 无法从航司获取价格。

将此视为临时技术故障。

稍后重试。

recentFlightDates 如何工作

recentFlightDates 返回搜索日期前后最多 7 个实际计划日期。

窗口目标为前后 3 天。

如果较早日期不可用，较晚日期将填补空缺。

列表仅包含有实际航班计划的日期。

API 级别错误

status != 0 表示请求在 API 级别失败。

常见值包括：

* 100、101、102 — 请求数据缺失或无效
* 109 — 超出搜索限制
* 110 — 超出 QPS 限制
* 112 — 请求超时
* 900 — 未授权
* 9999 — 内部错误

集成指导

当你想在生产集成前评估 Atlas 航线覆盖范围时使用此 API。

当需要可预订的路径时，使用标准预订流程。

有关从搜索到出票的正常流程，请参见预订概述。

Price Compare Search

Purpose:
Search comparable fares for a route/date/airline filter. The endpoint performs synchronous smart search and is intended for fare comparison scenarios.

Dependency:
No preceding function needs to be called before this API.

Important notes:
\- The returned settlement currency is determined by client configuration or the optional currency request field.
\- Total payable amount for one adult passenger is normally adultPrice + adultTax + transactionFeePerPax.
\- When supportCreditTransPayment = 1, vendorFare contains the airline/vendor-side fare. When pass-through payment is not supported, supportCreditTransPayment = 0 and vendorFare may be null or omitted.
\- ancillaryProductElements depends on client configuration and airline support.
\- links may include airline terms and conditions.
\- When status = 0 but routings is empty, check noResultReason for the business reason and possible recent available flight dates.
\- Display-currency values are for display only and should not be used for settlement, fare comparison, or accounting.

Accept (header, required=True): Expected response media type. Use application/json.
Content-Type (header, required=True): Request body media type. Use application/json.
Accept-Encoding (header, required=True): Enable gzip response compression when supported.
x-atlas-client-id (header, required=True): Atlas client ID. The server uses this value as the request customer identifier.
x-atlas-client-secret (header, required=True): Atlas client secret for authentication. Use the secret assigned to the client ID.

section: 响应字段 noResultReason

fields.name: noResultReason
fields.description: Structured no-result reason. Present when status = 0 and routings is empty, or null/absent when routings are returned.

fields.name: noResultReason.code
fields.description: No-result reason code. ROUTE_NOT_SUPPORTED means Atlas does not support the city pair. AIRLINE_NO_FLIGHT means no flight information was found for the route/date. FLIGHT_SOLD_OUT means flights exist but are sold out. PRICE_FETCH_FAILED means Atlas could not fetch price for the route/date.

fields.name: noResultReason.message
fields.description: Human-readable explanation of the no-result reason.

fields.name: noResultReason.recentFlightDates
fields.description: Recent dates with available flight information in YYYYMMDD format when Atlas can provide suggestions; otherwise null or empty.

text:
响应字段 noResultReason：
- noResultReason (object，可选): Structured no-result reason. Present when status = 0 and routings is empty, or null/absent when routings are returned.
- noResultReason.code (string，必填): No-result reason code. ROUTE_NOT_SUPPORTED means Atlas does not support the city pair. AIRLINE_NO_FLIGHT means no flight information was found for the route/date. FLIGHT_SOLD_OUT means flights exist but are sold out. PRICE_FETCH_FAILED means Atlas could not fetch price for the route/date.（枚举值：['ROUTE_NOT_SUPPORTED', 'AIRLINE_NO_FLIGHT', 'FLIGHT_SOLD_OUT', 'PRICE_FETCH_FAILED']）
- noResultReason.message (string，必填): Human-readable explanation of the no-result reason.
- noResultReason.recentFlightDates (array<string>，必填): Recent dates with available flight information in YYYYMMDD format when Atlas can provide suggestions; otherwise null or empty.

section: 端点概览
text:
验价

💬 需要帮助？ 如果遇到问题，请在帮助中心咨询 Eva，快速获取诊断建议。

在 search.do 之后使用此端点刷新运价、航线和预订要求。

它返回 order.do 使用的 sessionId。

使用不超过 6 小时的 routingIdentifier。

在 2 小时内使用返回的 sessionId 进行 order.do。

verify.do 与 getOffers.do 共享一个 60 QPM 的履约池。

超出限制的请求返回 HTTP 429 Too Many Requests。

请等待返回的 retryAfter 值后再重试。

有关共享规则和计数详情，请使用 API 请求限制。

Verify

Dependency:
The search function should be called prior to this call.

- When there is no price change, the "original" and the "new" price and tax will always be the same.
- When there is price change, there will be some difference between the "original" and the "new" price and tax.
- If paymentMethod in the request is 5（MoR）the MoR currency will be returned and amount in “VendorFare” and it’s paymentFee in cardChargeList. The paymentFee amount will not be added to the “VendorFare”.
- If paymentMethod in the request is 3（VCC Passthrough）the VCC Passthrough currency will be returned and amount in “VendorFare” and it’s paymentFee in cardChargeList (if any). The paymentFee amount will be added to the “VendorFare”.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/verify.do

Dependency:
The search function should be called prior to this call.

- When there is no price change, the "original" and the "new" price and tax will always be the same.
- When there is price change, there will be some difference between the "original" and the "new" price and tax.
- If paymentMethod in the request is 5（MoR）the MoR currency will be returned and amount in “VendorFare” and it’s paymentFee in cardChargeList. The paymentFee amount will not be added to the “VendorFare”.
- If paymentMethod in the request is 3（VCC Passthrough）the VCC Passthrough currency will be returned and amount in “VendorFare” and it’s paymentFee in cardChargeList (if any). The paymentFee amount will be added to the “VendorFare”.

Endpoint:
https://sandbox.atriptech.com/verify.do

section: Verify（/verify.do）请求体的 maxResponseTime 字段

fields.name: maxResponseTime
fields.description:
The interface timeout(in milliseconds), with a default of 5000ms. 
Note: 
Due to the influence of network transmission and computational performance, the client may still receive a normal result (instead of a timeout) when the response duration exceeds. This time is used to control the overall response duration of the interface within a certain range, and the error generally will not exceed several hundred milliseconds. If you have strict requirements for the timeout time, it is recommended that you set the timeout time of your HTTP tool library. If the HTTP tool library you use does not support this capability, you may need to use other tools to achieve it, and most programming languages provide relevant capabilities.

If you have strict requirements for the timeout time, it is recommended that you set the timeout time of your HTTP tool library. fields.description: Departure date of the flight. We do not require users to specify departure times. We do not support return segments based on specific departure time as well. Considering that the externally transmitted time may not match the actual flight segment time on the supplier's (airline's) side, this can lead to search results being lost. Therefore, we will return flights with the specified flight number departing on the specified date.

Since infantPrice and infantTax will never be null, when the fare does not support infants or is free for infants, both infantPrice and infantTax display 0. In this case, you need this field to distinguish which situation it is.

- true: infants is supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTax will >= 0
- false: infants is not supported by this fare, infantPrice and infantTaxwill be displayed as 0

section: Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段

fields.name: childMandatorySeatingFee
fields.description:
Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

text:
Routing 组件的 childMandatorySeatingFee 字段：
- childMandatorySeatingFee (number，可选): Only valid for FR integration.

FR Seat Selection Rules:
- Children under 12 years old are provided with free seats.
- Children must be seated in the same row as an adult.
- Each adult may accompany up to 4 children.

For fare families that do not include seat selection fees (e.g., Basic or Family Plus), FR offers discounted seat selection fees for adults traveling with children. ThechildMandatorySeatingFeefield displays this discounted fee.
For fare families that already include seat selection fees, this field will be null.

Handling by Atlas for Fare Families Without Seat Selection Fees:
- The number of children cannot exceed 4.
- Customers cannot select seats manually.
- Atlas will automatically assign seats randomly to one adult and all children according to FR's rules. The adult will be charged the childMandatorySeatingFee for their seat.

For Fare Families That Include Seat Selection Fees:
- Seat selection is free.
- Users may call the seat map API to select seats; otherwise, Atlas will automatically assign seats.

- transactionFeePerPax (number，必填) [deprecated]: Technical service fee per passenger. This field has been deprecated and final total transaction fee will calculated based on transactionFee and transactionFeeMode.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段

fields.name: transactionFee
fields.description:
Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFee 字段：
- transactionFee (number，必填): Technical service fee as per transactionFeeMode. The following lists the calculation methods for the final technical service fee in various situations.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_SEGMENT:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of segments.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_TICKET:transactionFee  number of passengers  number of orders on airline side.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_PAX:transactionFee * number of passengers.
- transactionFeeMode=PER_BOOKING:transactionFee.

section: Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段

fields.name: transactionFeeMode
fields.description:
Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

text:
Routing 组件的 transactionFeeMode 字段：
- transactionFeeMode (ref:TransactionFeeMode，必填): Calculation method for technical service fee.
- PER_SEGMENT: Calculate based on the number of segments in the order (number of travel segments * number of passengers)
- PER_TICKET: Calculate based on the number of orders on the airline's side
- PER_PAX: Calculate based on the number of passengers
- PER_BOOKING: Calculate based on each order

section: Routing 组件的 rule 字段

fields.name: rule.hasBaggage
fields.description:
This tag is used to identify if the fare includes free checked-in or cabin baggage.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

fields.name: rule.baggageElements
fields.description: The free baggage allowance

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].segmentNo
fields.description: The index of segment the baggage allowance applies to.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageType
fields.description: Type of the baggage.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].passengerType
fields.description:
The type of passenger the baggage allowance applies to.
- 0: Adult
- 1: Child
- 2: Infant

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggagePiece
fields.description:
Baggage pieces:
- 0: No limitation
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageWeight
fields.description:
Baggage Weight, with the unit of KG.
- 0: No Free baggage
- -1: No limitation on weight
- >0: Maximum weight

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].baggageSize
fields.description:
Baggage Size:
length＊width＊height and units. eg. 56＊36＊23cm, 18＊14＊8inch.
Or Total dimensions (length + width + height) of each piece. eg. L+W+H<=158cm.
Empty means no limitation.

fields.name: rule.baggageElements[].isAllWeight
fields.description: Baggage is all weight: true or false

fields.name: rule.refundRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the refund rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundType
fields.description:
Type of refund allowed.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example, when the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to refund an inbound flight.)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundStatus
fields.description:
Refund rule types (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundFee
fields.description: Refund penalty amount (for the most restrictive condition)

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of refund penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects refunds (for the most restrictive condition).
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Free for refund

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refNoshowFee
fields.description: Total refund fee (for the most restrictive condition): If refNoshow = H, it should not be "null". This value includes the refund fee and no-show penalty

fields.name: rule.refundRules[].refundMethod
fields.description:
Refund method: CashBackToOriginalPayment or Voucher.
- CashBackToOriginalPayment: Refund cash back to the original form of payment.
- Voucher: Refund in the form of a voucher.

fields.name: rule.changesRules
fields.description: This node is used to fetch the change rules of the fare. There is only one array element for one way, and two elements for round-trip. The first element is for the outbound, and the second element is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesType
fields.description:
Change flight type.
- 0: Wholly unused ticket
- 1: Partially used ticket (For example. When the passenger has used an outbound flight and wants to change an inbound flight)

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesStatus
fields.description:
Change flight rule type (for the most restrictive condition):
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free rescheduling

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].changesFee
fields.description:
Change flight fee (for the most restrictive condition):
- IfchangesStatus=H, it should not benull
- IfchangesStatus=T/F, it can benull

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].currency
fields.description: The currency of change flight fee

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshow
fields.description:
Indicates if a no-show affects changes (for the most restrictive condition).
Valid values:
- T: Non changeable
- H: Changeable with restrictions
- F: Free flight change

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoShowCondition
fields.description: Time before scheduled flight departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].revNoshowFee
fields.description: The total fee charged to change flight in case of no show. If revNoshow = H, it should not be "null." This value includes the change flight fee and no-show penalty.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList
fields.description: Change conditions

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].status
fields.description:
Level of refund/change.
- T: Non refundable
- H: Refundable with restrictions
- F: Full refundable

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].startMinute
fields.description: Starting time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].endMinute
fields.description: Ending time of rule application. Positive numbers represent XXX minutes before departure. Negative numbers represent XXX minutes after departure.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].amount
fields.description: Penalty amount for refund/change. If thestatusindicates free refund/change, then this field will be either0ornull.

fields.name: rule.changesRules[].ruleDetailList[].currency
fields.description: The currency of penalty

fields.name: rule.serviceElements
fields.description: This function is used to fetch the other service rules of the fare. There is only one array for one way, and two arrays for round-trip. The first array is for the outbound, and the second array is for the inbound.

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeSeat
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free seat selection is included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included
- 2: Partially free

fields.name: rule.serviceElements[].hasFreeMeal
fields.description:
A marker used to indicate whether free meals are included.
- 0: Not included
- 1: Included

section: Routing 组件的 expireTime 字段

fields.name: expireTime
fields.description:
If the current fare comes from the cache of Atlas, this field is used to indicate the estimated expiration time of the cache. This time is a certain moment in the future (UTC), and the format is:yyyy-MM-dd'T'HH:mm:ss'Z'.
Note: 
This time is estimated, which means Atlas may refresh the cache before or after that time.

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段

fields.name: ancillaryCode
fields.description:
A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

text:
AncillaryProduct 组件的 ancillaryCode 字段：
- ancillaryCode (string，必填): A code that is relatively readable by humans and contains information about auxiliary business specifications (such as weight and quantity limitations of luggage). 
Note: 
This content is only for display purposes and should not be used for programming purposes. That is to say, do not attempt to parse the information about auxiliary business specifications from this code. If you want to access the auxiliary business specifications, please use structured fields. For example, for luggage, please useauxBaggageElement.

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 auxBaggageElement 字段

fields.name: auxBaggageElement
fields.description: Baggage specification limitations. This node is valid only when the ancillary type (categoryCode) is baggage.

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.isAllWeight
fields.description:
Mark whether theweightfield restricts the total weight or the weight of a single piece.
- true: The weight is for all the pieces
- false: The weight is for each piece

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.piece
fields.description:
The maximum number of pieces that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No Limitation about piece
- >0: Maximum pieces

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.size
fields.description: Maximum size for the baggage

fields.name: auxBaggageElement.weight
fields.description:
The maximum weight that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No limitation for weight
- >0: Weight limit (KG)

text:
AncillaryProduct 组件的 auxBaggageElement 字段：
- auxBaggageElement (object，可选): Baggage specification limitations. This node is valid only when the ancillary type (categoryCode) is baggage.
- auxBaggageElement.isAllWeight (boolean，必填): Mark whether theweightfield restricts the total weight or the weight of a single piece.
- true: The weight is for all the pieces
- false: The weight is for each piece
- auxBaggageElement.piece (integer，必填): The maximum number of pieces that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No Limitation about piece
- >0: Maximum pieces
- auxBaggageElement.size (string，可选): Maximum size for the baggage
- auxBaggageElement.weight (integer，必填): The maximum weight that can be purchased per person.
- 0: No limitation for weight
- >0: Weight limit (KG)

section: AncillaryProduct 组件的 categoryCode 字段

fields.name: categoryCode
fields.description:
Type of the ancillary.

- StandardCheckInBaggage: Standard Check-in Baggage.
- CabinBaggage: Usually refers to the Cabin Baggage Overhead Locker. Transition value. It will gradually transition to CabinBaggageOverheadLocker.

- CabinBaggageUnderSeat: Cabin Baggage Under Seat. Usually refers to the personal item.

section: 端点概览
text:
支付与出票

💬 Need help? If you're stuck, ask Eva in the Help Center for instant diagnostics.

使用此端点支付已有订单。

发送 orderNo 和选定的 paymentMethod。

支付成功并不总是意味着出票已经完成。

使用查询订单确认最终出票状态。

Payment

Dependency:
Order function should be called in prior to this call.

- Atlas provides the information from the search.do API response itself whether VCC can be accepted as a mode of payment for an order. Please read the "supportCreditTransPayment" field in the search.do and verify.do responses. When this field is equal to "0" (zero), it means that only "deposit" mode of payment can be used and when this field is equal to "1" (one), it means that both the "deposit" as well as the "VCC" mode of payment can be used.

section: Payment（/pay.do）请求体的 creditCard 字段

fields.name: creditCard
fields.description: Credit card. It is necessary when using MoR(paymentMethod=5) or VCC passthrough(paymentMethod=3) payment.

fields.name: creditCard.cardNumber
fields.description: Credit card number that conforms to the Luhn algorithm.

fields.name: creditCard.cardCVV
fields.description: The Card Verification Value (CVV). For vcc passthrough, CVV is required. When using MoR, the CVV is mandatory if the card is being used for the first time, and for subsequent uses, it can be left as null (not empty string "").

fields.name: creditCard.cardExpireMonth
fields.description: The card expiry month as an integer with two digits(01-12), e.g. for February use 02.

fields.name: creditCard.cardExpireYear
fields.description: The card expiry year as an integer with two digits, e.g. for 2026 use 26.

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderLastName
fields.description: Last name of the card holder

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderFirstName
fields.description: First name of the card holder

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderCountry
fields.description: The ISO 3166-1 alpha-2 code for the country of the billing address associated with the card.

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderProvince
fields.description: The state/province of the billing address associated with the card. Only use tow-letter code, for example, use "CA" and not "California".

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderCity
fields.description: The city of the billing address associated with the card.

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderPostCode
fields.description: The postal code of the billing address associated with the card.

fields.name: creditCard.cardHolderAddress
fields.description: The first/second line of the billing address associated with the card.

fields.name: creditCard.reusable
fields.description:
A flag used to indicate whether it is a single-use card or a multi-use card.
-true: multiple-use card
-false: single-use card

Explanation:
Atlas hopes that users can inform us of this information because Atlas is cautious when making payments for multiple cards.
For example, when encountering unknown errors in payment to the airline, Atlas will not easily attempt to retry, as this may result in multiple deductions.

fields.name: creditCard.paymentLimit
fields.description: Certain airlines may experience fare change after payment submission due to their inability to hold seat reservations. You can use this parameter to set a maximum acceptable payment amount(in vendor currency) threshold. This is the maximum amount which can be used to create the booking using a VCC.

fields.name: creditCard.threeDS
fields.description: The information used for the 3DS verification. It is only required in the MoR payment scenario.

fields.name: creditCard.threeDS.ip
fields.description: The device IP of the end user. By default, the system will use the source IP of the current request.

text:

- creditCard (object，可选): Credit card. It is necessary when using MoR(paymentMethod=5) or VCC passthrough(paymentMethod=3) payment.（还有 15 个嵌套子字段，完整字段名/类型/含义见该 chunk 的 fields 元数据，不在此列出）
